summary: Philippines public-only skeleton for SEC-number status planning. It does not expose broad SEC Company Information Lookup, AFS/GIS, certified documents, or bulk monitoring without SEC subscription terms.

auth.notes: The likely public proof-of-concept path is the SEC Number API with a limited free quota. Any live adapter must keep credentials server-side and document quota, caching, and hosted-use terms.

licensing.notes: SEC API Marketplace material distinguishes free SEC-number access from paid Company Information Lookup packages. Broader company data, AFS/GIS, certified documents, higher quotas, and bulk workflows require subscription terms.

freshness.refreshCadence: manual source review until SEC API credential terms are approved

publicDataLimits.message: This pack documents Philippines source boundaries and does not perform a live SEC lookup.
Do not return broad SEC company information, AFS, GIS, certified documents, or high-quota results without approved SEC subscription terms.
Outputs are public-source planning artifacts and not legal, tax, credit, investment, or licensed compliance advice.

tools.name: ph_sec_number_status
tools.purpose: Plan a bounded SEC-number status lookup and return credential, quota, and paid-data gaps when the API path is unavailable.

publicDataLimits.message: The initial tool must be limited to explicit SEC-number status evidence and must not retrieve paid company-information packages.

expectedGaps.message: Set PH_API_SEC_KEY and confirm SEC API Marketplace terms before running a live SEC-number status lookup.

contributionNotes: Review SEC API Marketplace terms for free quota, hosted use, caching, attribution, and subscription limits before adding a live adapter.
Keep PH_API_SEC_KEY server-side only and add tests for missing key, quota exhaustion, no-match, ambiguous-match, and upstream failure.
Do not expose AFS, GIS, certified documents, secondary licence packs, or broad Company Information Lookup data unless subscription terms permit the exact use.
Preserve provenance, freshness, gaps, and limits in every output.
